# `groups` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `GroupExpense`

```prisma
model GroupExpense {
  id                   String               @id @default(uuid())
  userId               String
  deviceId             String?
  name                 String
  totalAmount          Decimal              @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  paidBy               String?
  date                 DateTime
  members              String? // DEPRECATED: Use GroupExpenseMember relation instead
  items                String?
  description          String?
  category             String?
  subcategory          String?
  splitType            String?
  yourShare            Decimal?             @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  expenseTransactionId String?
  createdBy            String?
  createdByName        String?
  status               String?
  notificationStatus   String?
  syncStatus           String               @default("synced")
  createdAt            DateTime             @default(now())
  updatedAt            DateTime             @updatedAt
  deletedAt            DateTime?
  transactions         Transaction[]
  paidByAccount        Account?             @relation(fields: [paidBy], references: [id])
  user                 User                 @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  groupMembers         GroupExpenseMember[] // New relational structure

  @@index([date])
  @@index([paidBy])
  @@index([syncStatus])
  @@index([userId])
  @@map("group_expenses")
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `GroupExpenseMember`

```prisma
model GroupExpenseMember {
  id             String       @id @default(uuid())
  groupExpenseId String
  userId         String? // Optional: may be a friend without user account
  friendId       String? // Links to the Friend record for management/profile views
  name           String // Display name
  email          String?
  phone          String?
  shareAmount    Decimal      @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  hasPaid        Boolean      @default(false)
  paidAt         DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt
  deletedAt      DateTime?
  groupExpense   GroupExpense @relation(fields: [groupExpenseId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  friend         Friend?      @relation(fields: [friendId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([groupExpenseId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([friendId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
